text_block_list.name: Miho Student
text_block_list.text: I know it's—hic—pathetic of me... Sniff! Sorry about this... I want to be strong, just like you, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you're fine. Y'know, when I first moved to
Japan, I really wanted to go back home too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't so much that I felt lonely or anythin', but
I kept missing little things, like licorice.

text_block_list.name: Miho Student
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know that feeling... It's like literally
missing the taste of home... I want... I want to eat
my grammy's apple pie!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, don't cry! I'll bake one for you! It might
not live up to your grandmother's, though.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
(I've got training real soon... I won't make it on
time if I don't finish the pie fast enough, but...)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I can't leave my cute little resident all sad
and teary-eyed like this!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, give me a helpin' hand! We can have
some freshly baked pie together once we're done!
